languages.text: {n}Высокий фактотум почтительно склоняется перед троном, протягивая вам богато украшенный контейнер.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, спешу доложить, что недавняя смута на Янусе была подавлена усилиями меровских гвардейцев. Аристократия мира шлет вам этот дар в знак признательности".
languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Фактотум
Выдать аугмент
РТ на троне Augment_Arm_02_Hunter_Item

traits.locale_text: {n}Высокий Фактотум почтительно склоняется перед троном, протягивая вам богато украшенный контейнер с эмблемой Адептус Механикус.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, спешу доложить, что недавняя смута на Янусе была подавлена усилиями меровских гвардейцев. Аристократия мира шлет вам этот дар в знак признательности".
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.translation_comment:
[blueprint] Фактотум
Выдать аугмент
РТ на троне Augment_Arm_02_Hunter_Item

languages.text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."
languages.original_text: {n}Высокий фактотум почтительно склоняется перед троном, протягивая вам богато украшенный контейнер.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, спешу доложить, что недавняя смута на Янусе была подавлена усилиями меровских гвардейцев. Аристократия мира шлет вам этот дар в знак признательности".

The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

{n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending toward you an ornate container bearing the emblem of the Adeptus Mechanicus.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guard. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

languages.text: {n}El Sumo Factótum hace una respetuosa reverencia ante el trono y te ofrece un ornamentado recipiente.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me complace informarle de que los recientes disturbios en Janus han sido reprimidos gracias a la intervención de la Guardia Meroviana. Los aristócratas del planeta le envían este obsequio como muestra de su gratitud».
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

traits.locale_text: {n}El Sumo Factótum hace una respetuosa reverencia ante el trono y te ofrece un ornamentado recipiente.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, me complace informarle de que los recientes disturbios en Janus han sido reprimidos gracias a la intervención de la Guardia Meroviana. Los aristócratas del planeta le envían este obsequio como muestra de su gratitud».

languages.text: {n}高阶顾问恭敬地朝宝座俯身行礼，双手向你奉上一个装饰华丽的容器。{/n}“大人，我很高兴地向您禀报，加努斯近日的叛乱已由梅罗夫卫队平息。该界的贵族送来这份赠礼，以表感激之情。”
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

traits.locale_text: {n}高阶顾问恭敬地朝宝座俯身行礼，双手向你奉上一个装饰华丽的容器。{/n}“大人，我很高兴地向您禀报，加努斯近日的叛乱已由梅罗夫卫队平息。该界的贵族送来这份赠礼，以表感激之情。”

languages.text: {n}Le haut factotum s'incline respectueusement devant le trône et vous tend un coffret ouvragé.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, j'ai l'honneur de vous annoncer que les troubles survenus récemment sur Janus ont été réprimés par les gardes meroviens. Les nobles maisons de ce monde vous envoient ce cadeau en guise de remerciement. »
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le haut factotum s'incline respectueusement devant le trône et vous tend un coffret ouvragé.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, j'ai l'honneur de vous annoncer que les troubles survenus récemment sur Janus ont été réprimés par les gardes meroviens. Les nobles maisons de ce monde vous envoient ce cadeau en guise de remerciement. »

languages.text: {n}Arşıkâhya, tahtın önünde saygıyla eğiliyor ve sana süslü bir kutu uzatıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Janus'taki son huzursuzlukların Merov Muhafızları'nın çabalarıyla bastırıldığını bildirmekten memnuniyet duyarım. Gezegenin aristokrasisi, bu hediyeyi minnettarlıklarının bir göstergesi olarak gönderiyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

traits.locale_text: {n}Arşıkâhya, tahtın önünde saygıyla eğiliyor ve sana süslü bir kutu uzatıyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, Janus'taki son huzursuzlukların Merov Muhafızları'nın çabalarıyla bastırıldığını bildirmekten memnuniyet duyarım. Gezegenin aristokrasisi, bu hediyeyi minnettarlıklarının bir göstergesi olarak gönderiyor."

languages.text: {n}高官は王座の前に深く頭を下げ、あなたに向かって装飾された容器を差し伸べた。{/n}「閣下、ジャヌスでの最近の騒動は、メロヴィアンの衛兵の尽力により鎮圧されました。世界の貴族たちは感謝の意を込めて、この贈り物をお送りします。」
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."

traits.locale_text: {n}高官は王座の前に深く頭を下げ、あなたに向かって装飾された容器を差し伸べた。{/n}「閣下、ジャヌスでの最近の騒動は、メロヴィアンの衛兵の尽力により鎮圧されました。世界の貴族たちは感謝の意を込めて、この贈り物をお送りします。」

languages.text: {n}Das Hoch-Faktotum verneigt sich respektvoll vor dem Thron und reicht dir einen verzierten Behälter.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich freue mich, berichten zu können, dass die kürzlichen Unruhen auf Janus durch die merovianische Garde beigelegt wurden. Die Adeligen der Welt schicken Euch dieses Geschenk als Zeichen ihrer Dankbarkeit."
languages.original_text: {n}The High Factotum bows respectfully before the throne, extending an ornate container toward you.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I am pleased to report that the recent unrest upon Janus has been suppressed through the efforts of the Merovian Guardsmen. The world's aristocracy sends this gift as a token of their gratitude."
